pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description ('music technology company')

Task generation scripts create buggy python logic (python_debugging, domain_logic) based on music theory concepts utilizing modulo 12 math (modular_arithmetic), and verify fixes through pytest (test_driven_development).
verifier.py checks for a minimum score of 60 based on fixing 5 root causes (20 points each).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Python code simulating a music theory library. The occupation (Software Developer, 15-1252.00) and SOC major group (Computer and Mathematical) match standard O*NET/SOC classifications. The task accurately entails debugging five music-theory domain logic bugs (involving modular 12 arithmetic for intervals, keys, and octaves) against a Pytest suite, with verifier.py explicitly enforcing a pass threshold of 60 points.
